title: alyssum handelii
intro: Alyssum handelii, also known as Madwort, is a flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help relieve respiratory issues and soothe digestive problems. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. Alyssum handelii can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation, ease congestion, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
